metadata.title: {agencyName} | Real estate in {city}
metadata.description: Explore the starter landing page for {agencyName} in {city}. Showcase listings, trusted agents, and a clear call to action in one polished public page.

hero.description: Thousands of listings, from homes and apartments to commercial spaces and premium investments, all in one place.

search.title: Search Properties
search.description: Browse listings by location, price, and category until you find the right fit for your goals.

visit.title: Schedule a Visit
visit.description: Book in-person or virtual tours directly from the listing and get confirmation from the team quickly.

deal.title: Close the Deal
deal.description: Move forward with expert support through negotiations, paperwork, and every final step.

quotes.sarah: Found our dream home in under two weeks. The platform made it easy to filter options and schedule tours without hassle.
quotes.marcus: As an investor, I needed reliable data and fast listings. This platform delivered both and helped me close three deals in one quarter.
quotes.priya: The rental search was smooth from start to finish. I found a great apartment and signed digitally the same day.

agents.title: Meet Our Agents
agents.description: Our licensed agents bring local expertise and clear guidance to every transaction.

cta.description: Join buyers, renters, and investors who trust {agencyName} to help them move with confidence.

footer.description: {city}''s trusted real estate landing. Buy, sell, or rent with confidence.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.description: The page you are looking for was moved, renamed, or was never published on this public landing.
notFound.footer: HTTP 404 — We could not find what you were looking for
